visible_input.question: Expand and find the sum $p(x) + q(x)$ of the following two polynomials: $p(x) = 8 (x-2)^2, q(x) = 4 (4 x+5)^4$

canonical_initial_turn.assistant_response: The sum of the two polynomials is $1024 x^4+5120 x^3+9608 x^2+7968 x+2532$.
